summary: Dependabot PR #892: Bump markupsafe from 2.1.3 to 2.1.5 in /requirements
CI check failed on PR #892: 4 test failures in test_utils.py
PR #892 comment by maintainer: 'Looks like the markupsafe bump broke some echo-related tests'

payload.author: davidism
payload.body: CI is red. The markupsafe bump seems to have broken 4 tests in test_utils.py. Can someone investigate?

summary: Detailed failure: test_echo_stdin_and_stderr - AttributeError: module 'markupsafe' has no attribute 'soft_str'
#pallets-dev: 'markupsafe 2.1.5 removed the soft_str function we depend on in click.utils'

payload.author: contributor-jane
payload.text: I looked at the markupsafe changelog - they deprecated soft_str in 2.1.4 and removed it in 2.1.5. Our click.utils.echo() uses it for string coercion.
